'''joyayaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:iced|iced]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-y-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iced|iced]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| joyayaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:joyayithi|joyayithi]] || [[word:joyayiji|joyayiji]] || [[word:joyayishi|joyayishi]] || [[word:joyayiki|joyayiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:joyayuthuthu|joyayuthuthu]] || [[word:joyayujuju|joyayujuju]] || [[word:joyayushushu|joyayushushu]] || [[word:joyayukuku|joyayukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:joyayuthu|joyayuthu]] || [[word:joyayuju|joyayuju]] || [[word:joyayushu|joyayushu]] || [[word:joyayuku|joyayuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:joyayufthuf|joyayufthuf]] || [[word:joyayufjuf|joyayufjuf]] || [[word:joyayufshuf|joyayufshuf]] || [[word:joyayufkuf|joyayufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:joyayethe|joyayethe]] || [[word:joyayeje|joyayeje]] || [[word:joyayeshe|joyayeshe]] || [[word:joyayeke|joyayeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:joyayothotho|joyayothotho]] || [[word:joyayojojo|joyayojojo]] || [[word:joyayoshosho|joyayoshosho]] || [[word:joyayokoko|joyayokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:joyayotho|joyayotho]] || [[word:joyayojo|joyayojo]] || [[word:joyayosho|joyayosho]] || [[word:joyayoko|joyayoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:joyayofthof|joyayofthof]] || [[word:joyayofjof|joyayofjof]] || [[word:joyayofshof|joyayofshof]] || [[word:joyayofkof|joyayofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:joyayÃŸfthÃŸf|joyayÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:joyayÃŸfjÃŸf|joyayÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:joyayÃŸfshÃŸf|joyayÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:joyayÃŸfkÃŸf|joyayÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:joyayÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|joyayÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:joyayÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|joyayÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:joyayÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|joyayÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:joyayÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|joyayÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:joyayÃŸfthÃŸf|joyayÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:joyayÃŸfjÃŸf|joyayÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:joyayÃŸfshÃŸf|joyayÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:joyayÃŸfkÃŸf|joyayÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:joyayÃŸfthÃŸf|joyayÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:joyayÃŸfjÃŸf|joyayÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:joyayÃŸfshÃŸf|joyayÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:joyayÃŸfkÃŸf|joyayÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:joyayÃḊthÃḊ|joyayÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:joyayÃḊjÃḊ|joyayÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:joyayÃḊshÃḊ|joyayÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:joyayÃḊkÃḊ|joyayÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:joyayathatha|joyayathatha]] || [[word:joyayajaja|joyayajaja]] || [[word:joyayashasha|joyayashasha]] || [[word:joyayakaka|joyayakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:joyayatha|joyayatha]] || [[word:joyayaja|joyayaja]] || [[word:joyayasha|joyayasha]] || [[word:joyayaka|joyayaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:joyayafthaf|joyayafthaf]] || [[word:joyayafjaf|joyayafjaf]] || [[word:joyayafshaf|joyayafshaf]] || [[word:joyayafkaf|joyayafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:joyayasha|joyayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:joyayshÃḋsha|joyayshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:joyayrosha|joyayrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:joyaymusha|joyaymusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:joyayasha|joyayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojoyaynkshÃḋsha|gojoyaynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojoyaynkrosha|gojoyaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojoyaynkmusha|gojoyaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojoyaynkyasha|gojoyaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:joyayayasha|joyayayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:joyayayshÃḋsha|joyayayshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:joyayayrosha|joyayayrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:joyayaymusha|joyayaymusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:joyayayasha|joyayayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojoyayaynkshÃḋsha|gojoyayaynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojoyayaynkrosha|gojoyayaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojoyayaynkmusha|gojoyayaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojoyayaynkyasha|gojoyayaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:jeyÃḊyasha|jeyÃḊyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jeyÃḊyshÃḋsha|jeyÃḊyshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jeyÃḊyrosha|jeyÃḊyrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jeyÃḊymusha|jeyÃḊymusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jeyÃḊyasha|jeyÃḊyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojeyÃḊynkshÃḋsha|gojeyÃḊynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojeyÃḊynkrosha|gojeyÃḊynkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojeyÃḊynkmusha|gojeyÃḊynkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojeyÃḊynkyasha|gojeyÃḊynkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:joyfayasha|joyfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:joyfayshÃḋsha|joyfayshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:joyfayrosha|joyfayrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:joyfaymusha|joyfaymusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:joyfayasha|joyfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojoyfaynkshÃḋsha|gojoyfaynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojoyfaynkrosha|gojoyfaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojoyfaynkmusha|gojoyfaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojoyfaynkyasha|gojoyfaynkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
